name: cmdmap
description: Local-first command surface mapper for safer humans and agents.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js scan fixtures/polyrepo --out tmp/COMMANDS.md && node dist/src/cli.js scan fixtures/polyrepo --format json > tmp/commands.json && node dist/src/cli.js explain "npm run release"
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
